name: coding-style
description: 'Follow coding style conventions for Lixpi. Use when writing code, reviewing code style, or needing language-specific formatting and convention rules for TypeScript, Python, or any language in this project.'
---

# Coding Style

Language-specific coding style guides are documented in `documentation/coding-style-guides/`.

## How to Find the Right Guide

Browse `documentation/coding-style-guides/` — each file covers one language:

```
documentation/coding-style-guides/
  TYPESCRIPT.md
  (future languages go here)
```

When writing or reviewing code:

1. Navigate to `documentation/coding-style-guides/` and find the guide matching the language you're working in.
2. Read the full guide and follow every convention listed there.
